title: x-quick Croatian fix Bisque
description: A resinous, low-fat, and turmeric-infused bisque inspired by Croatian cuisine, featuring a miso-marinated broth.

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: white miso for a sweeter flavor or red miso for a more intense umami taste

ingredients.name: bay leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh or dried, whichever you prefer

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: freshly squeezed for a brighter flavor

ingredients.name: carrots
ingredients.notes: peeled and chopped for a smooth texture

instructions: Combine turmeric, miso paste, and bay leaves in a bowl.
Add carrots, onion, and garlic to the bowl and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a donabe pot and pour in chicken broth.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
